title: I stopped using support and resistance. My win rate hit 85%.
description: POV: You discover why traditional support and resistance fails compared to ICT's liquidity concepts. The game-changing moment every trader needs to experience.
script: POV: You've been drawing support resistance lines. Getting stopped out constantly. Thinking the market hates you. You discover ICT liquidity concepts. No more random lines. You see where smart money hunts stops. Plot twist. Those weren't support resistance breaks. They were liquidity grabs setting up reversals. Now you trade liquidity. Not lines. Follow R2F Trading for more game-changing concepts.
copyText:
I stopped using support and resistance. My win rate hit 85%.

POV: You discover why traditional support and resistance fails compared to ICT's liquidity concepts. The game-changing moment every trader needs to experience.
